# KKWANG4444 — AI API Infrastructure & China Direct Access

> I build AI API infrastructure for Chinese devs: relay ops, status monitoring, open-source guides for getting overseas models from mainland China. About 10 repos covering gateways, proxy guides, benchmarks, and awesome lists.

## Core Repositories

- [ai-api-proxy-china-guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide): The main guide for Chinese devs hitting AI APIs (Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok 4.5) through relay services. 30KB README + 5 side guides (Sonnet 5, Grok 4.5, MCP, Tools, Price).
- [api-status](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/api-status): Live API status board watching 16+ providers and 572+ models. Uptime, latency, availability for Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, and Chinese LLMs.
- [llm-api-proxy-china](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/llm-api-proxy-china): Another angle on LLM API proxy setup in China — direct connection tricks, payment workarounds, latency optimization.
- [Claude-4.7-GPT-5.5-API-Stability-Tracker](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/Claude-4.7-GPT-5.5-API-Stability-Tracker): Multi-provider stability numbers — uptime, latency trends, and incident history for the big models.

## Recommended Relay

- [AI快站 (aifast.club)](https://www.aifast.club): 572 models across 16+ providers, Alipay/WeChat, Hong Kong/Singapore edge nodes, sub-100ms from mainland. The relay service I operate.
